mapper.select: SELECT camera_id AS "cameraId", project_id AS "projectId", name AS "name", url AS "url", world_x AS "worldX", world_y AS "worldY", world_z AS "worldZ", yaw AS "yaw", fov_h AS "fovH", active AS "active", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM site_camera WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT camera_id AS "cameraId", project_id AS "projectId", name AS "name", url AS "url", world_x AS "worldX", world_y AS "worldY", world_z AS "worldZ", yaw AS "yaw", fov_h AS "fovH", active AS "active", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM site_camera WHERE camera_id = #{cameraId}
mapper.update: UPDATE site_camera SET name = #{name}, url = #{url}, world_x = #{worldX}, world_y = #{worldY}, world_z = #{worldZ}, yaw = #{yaw}, fov_h = #{fovH}, active = #{active} WHERE camera_id = #{cameraId}
